definition_of_done: On mobile widths, all main content, header, sections, cards/grids, trust page content, and footers retain a readable left/right gutter; inline variable names inside prose read as part of the body text while intentionally technical UI labels/formulas can remain monospace; desktop layout and existing visual identity remain unchanged.

criteria.description: At 375px and 390px viewport widths, header, hero, sections, grids/cards, and footer on / have non-zero left/right gutter and text does not touch the viewport edge.
criteria.evidence_expected: Playwright screenshot or computed-style evidence for .site-header.site-wrapper, .hero.site-wrapper, .section.site-wrapper, and .status-footer.site-wrapper.

criteria.description: At 375px and 390px viewport widths, trust page intro, trust panel host, JSON link, recompute note, and footer retain readable left/right gutter.
criteria.evidence_expected: Playwright screenshot or computed-style evidence on /trust.html.

criteria.description: Inline schema field names and variable names inside prose no longer render in IBM Plex Mono, while formulas and technical UI labels remain monospace.
criteria.evidence_expected: Computed font-family checks for prose code examples and .status-formula code, plus screenshot review.

evidence_refs.excerpt: global inline code inherits font family

criteria.description: No horizontal overflow is introduced on / or /trust.html at common mobile widths.
criteria.evidence_expected: Browser check comparing documentElement.scrollWidth to clientWidth at 375px and 390px.
criteria.not_verified_reason: No local Playwright CLI, package.json, node_modules Playwright package, or Playwright config is present in this checkout, so browser viewport overflow checks were unavailable.
